markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.0203 — License Fee

The commission may set the amount of a license fee according to a scale graduated by the number of off-premise signs owned by the license applicant regulated under this chapter and commercial signs owned by the applicant regulated under Chapter 391 (Highway Beautification on Interstate and Primary Systems and Certain Roads) .

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 964 (S.B.2006), Sec. 30, eff. June 15, 2017.*
